## Summary

Describe the user-facing problem and solution.

## Testing

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --locked --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test --locked --all-targets --all-features`
- [ ] Real environment integration was run, or is not required

## Compatibility

- [ ] No `dual.toml` or `dual.lock` compatibility change
- [ ] Compatibility changes and migration behavior are documented
- [ ] Linux, macOS, and Windows implications were considered

## Notes

Include screenshots, logs, follow-up work, or reviewer context when useful.
